\tzpentry{ID4200}{Critical Quantum Magnetic Flux Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4200 introduces Critical Quantum Magnetic Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Phi_{\text{critical}} = \sqrt{\frac{\hbar c^3}{Ge^2}} \times \alpha \end{equation}
